# DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE - It is automatically generated by the Monarchy Law Auto Replacer
# See the `tools` folder in the mod's root directory

REPLACE:ideology_humanitarian_royalist = { # Average Progressiveness - 55
	icon = "gfx/interface/icons/ideology_icons/ideology_leader/ideology_leader_humanitarian_royalist.dds"

	character_ideology = yes

	lawgroup_governance_principles = {
		law_monarchy = strongly_approve
		law_presidential_republic = disapprove
		law_parliamentary_republic = disapprove
		law_corporate_state = disapprove
		law_social_monarchy = approve
		law_theocracy = disapprove
		law_council_republic = strongly_disapprove
	}

	lawgroup_citizenship = {
		law_ethnostate = strongly_disapprove
		law_national_supremacy = strongly_disapprove
		law_racial_segregation = disapprove
		law_cultural_exclusion = neutral
		law_multicultural = approve
		law_subjecthood = neutral
	}

	lawgroup_free_speech = {
		law_protected_speech = approve
		law_right_of_assembly = neutral
		law_censorship = disapprove
		law_outlawed_dissent = strongly_disapprove
	}

	lawgroup_rights_of_women = {
		law_no_womens_rights = strongly_disapprove
		law_women_own_property = disapprove
		law_women_in_the_workplace = neutral
		law_womens_suffrage = approve
	}

	lawgroup_childrens_rights = {
		law_child_labor_allowed = strongly_disapprove
		law_restricted_child_labor = disapprove
		law_compulsory_primary_school = approve
	}

	country_trigger = {
		has_technology_researched = feminism
	}

	interest_group_leader_trigger = {
		ideology_humanitarian_royalist_valid_trigger = yes
	}

	non_interest_group_leader_trigger = {
		NAND = {
			has_role_of_type = agitator
			owner = {
				RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_multicultural
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_protected_speech
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_womens_suffrage
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_compulsory_primary_school
			}
		}
		interest_group ?= {
			ideology_humanitarian_royalist_valid_trigger = yes
		}
	}

	interest_group_leader_weight = {
		add = {
			value = 50
			desc = "base_value"
		}

		# more likely for intelligentsia
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_interest_group_type = ig_intelligentsia
			}
			add = {
				value = 50
				desc = "ig_intelligentsia"
			}
		}

		# Massively more likely in Monarchy, less so in republics
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					country_has_monarchy_law = yes
				}
			}
			add = {
				value = 50
				desc = "MONARCHY_LAW"
			}
		}
		else = {
			add = {
				value = -50
				desc = "NO_MONARCHY_LAW"
			}
		}

		# More likely if issues are relevant - greater bonus to this than usual
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner.ideology_humanitarian_disfavoured_laws > 0
			}
			add = {
				value = owner.ideology_humanitarian_disfavoured_laws
				multiply = 16
				desc = "DISFAVORED_LAWS"
			}
		}

		# Less likely if issues are not relevant
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner.ideology_humanitarian_royalist_favoured_laws > 0
			}
			subtract = {
				value = owner.ideology_humanitarian_royalist_favoured_laws
				multiply = 8
				desc = "FAVORED_LAWS"
			}
		}

		# less likely for angry trade unions outside of Council Republic, they should go communist instead
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					has_technology_researched = socialism
					NOT = {
						has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_council_republic
					}
				}
				is_interest_group_type = ig_trade_unions
				ig_approval <= define:NPolitics|APPROVAL_THRESHOLD_UNHAPPY
			}
			add = {
				value = -50
				desc = "IG_APPROVAL_BELOW_UNHAPPY"
			}
		}

		# Pedro JE victory
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					has_variable = brz_enduring_empire
				}
			}
			add = {
				value = 100
				desc = "BRZ_ENDURING_EMPIRE"
			}
		}

		# liberal and/or radical leaders have a higher spawn chance if the Dreyfusards won.
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_variable = dreyfusard_victory
			}
			add = {
				value = 50
				desc = "DREYFUSARD_VICTORY"
			}
		}
		# liberal and/or radical leaders have a higher spawn chance if you win the Two Spains as the liberals.
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_variable = spa_two_spains_liberal_victory
			}
			add = {
				value = 50
				desc = "SPA_LIBERAL_VICTORY"
			}
		}
		# liberal and/or radical leaders have a higher spawn chance if you succeed in Portugal's Second Liberalism.
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_variable = por_second_liberalism_victory
			}
			add = {
				value = 50
				desc = "POR_LIBERAL_VICTORY"
			}
		}
		# liberal and/or radical leaders have a higher spawn chance if the Hungarian Revolution was successful.
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_variable = hungarian_revolution_increased_liberalism
			}
			add = {
				value = 50
				desc = "HUNGARIAN_REVOLUTION"
			}
		}

		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_variable = communist_ig_var
					has_variable = chose_vanguardism
					has_variable = chose_anarchism
					has_variable = chose_communism
					has_variable = chose_ethno_nationalism
					has_variable = chose_conservatism
					has_variable = chose_fascism
				}
			}
			multiply = {
				value = 0.1
				desc = "CHOSE_A_DIFFERENT_PATH"
			}
		}
	}

	non_interest_group_leader_weight = {
		value = 100

		# more likely for intelligentsia
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_interest_group_type = ig_intelligentsia
			}
			add = 50
		}

		# Massively more likely in Monarchy, less so in republics
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					country_has_monarchy_law = yes
				}
			}
			add = 50
		}
		else = {
			subtract = 50
		}

		# More likely if issues are relevant - greater bonus to this than usual
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner.ideology_humanitarian_royalist_disfavoured_laws > 0
			}
			add = {
				value = owner.ideology_humanitarian_royalist_disfavoured_laws
				multiply = 16
			}
		}

		# Less likely if issues are not relevant
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner.ideology_humanitarian_royalist_favoured_laws > 0
			}
			subtract = {
				value = owner.ideology_humanitarian_royalist_favoured_laws
				multiply = 8
			}
		}

		# liberal and/or radical leaders have a higher spawn chance if you win the Two Spains as the liberals and choose to have woke commanders.
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_role_of_type = general
					has_role_of_type = admiral
				}
				has_variable = spa_liberal_military_var
			}
			add = 50
		}

		# less likely for angry trade unions outside of Council Republic, they should go communist instead
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					has_technology_researched = socialism
					NOT = {
						has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_council_republic
					}
				}
				is_interest_group_type = ig_trade_unions
				interest_group.ig_approval < 5
			}
			add = -50
		}

		if = {
			limit = {
				interest_group ?= {
					OR = {
						has_variable = chose_ethno_nationalism
						has_variable = chose_conservatism
						has_variable = chose_fascism
						has_variable = communist_ig_var
						has_variable = chose_vanguardism
						has_variable = chose_anarchism
						has_variable = chose_communism
					}
				}
			}
			multiply = 0.1
		}
	}
}

REPLACE:ideology_carlist = { # Average Progressiveness - -45
	icon = "gfx/interface/icons/ideology_icons/ideology_leader/ideology_leader_carlist.dds"

	character_ideology = yes

	lawgroup_governance_principles = {
		law_monarchy = strongly_approve
		law_presidential_republic = disapprove
		law_parliamentary_republic = disapprove
		law_corporate_state = neutral
		law_social_monarchy = approve
		law_theocracy = disapprove
		law_council_republic = strongly_disapprove
	}

	lawgroup_economic_system = {
		law_traditionalism = strongly_approve
		law_agrarianism = approve
		law_interventionism = disapprove
		law_industry_banned = disapprove
		law_laissez_faire = disapprove
		law_cooperative_ownership = strongly_disapprove
		law_command_economy = strongly_disapprove
		law_extraction_economy = disapprove
	}

	lawgroup_distribution_of_power = {
		law_oligarchy = approve
		law_autocracy = strongly_approve # Were opposed to absolutism, but the game defines Oligarchy as a bourgeois system
		law_single_party_state = strongly_disapprove
		law_landed_voting = disapprove
		law_wealth_voting = strongly_disapprove
		law_census_voting = strongly_disapprove
		law_universal_suffrage = strongly_disapprove
		law_anarchy = strongly_disapprove
		law_technocracy = strongly_disapprove
	}

	lawgroup_citizenship = {
		law_ethnostate = neutral
		law_subjecthood = approve
		law_national_supremacy = neutral
		law_racial_segregation = neutral
		law_cultural_exclusion = neutral
		law_multicultural = disapprove
	}

	lawgroup_church_and_state = {
		law_state_religion = strongly_approve
		law_freedom_of_conscience = disapprove
		law_total_separation = strongly_disapprove
		law_state_atheism = strongly_disapprove
	}

	country_trigger = {
		OR = {
			country_has_primary_culture = cu:spanish # I am in Spain...
			country_has_primary_culture = cu:catalan # ...without the S
			country_has_primary_culture = cu:basque # ...without the A
		}
		NOT = {
			has_technology_researched = corporatism
		}
		NOR = {
			any_interest_group = {
				has_ideology = ideology:ideology_republican_paternalistic
			}
			has_variable = monarchy_stamped_out_var
		}
	}

	interest_group_leader_trigger = {
		ideology_carlist_valid_trigger = yes
	}

	non_interest_group_leader_trigger = {
		# Agitators should have an ideology at odds with current laws
		NAND = {
			has_role_of_type = agitator
			owner = {
				RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
				has_law = law_type:law_traditionalism
				has_law = law_type:law_oligarchy
				has_law = law_type:law_subjecthood
				has_law = law_type:law_state_religion
			}
		}
		interest_group ?= {
			ideology_carlist_valid_trigger = yes
		}
	}

	interest_group_leader_weight = {
		add = {
			value = 200
			desc = "base_value"
		}
		# less likely in a theocracy
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
				}
			}
			add = {
				value = -75
				desc = "THEOCRACY_LAW"
			}
		}
		# less likely if IG is happy in a republic
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					NOT = { country_has_monarchy_law = yes }
				}
				ig_approval > 0
			}
			add = {
				value = -100
				desc = "HAPPY_IN_REPUBLIC"
			}
		}

		# more likely for LO and Devout
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					is_interest_group_type = ig_landowners
					is_interest_group_type = ig_devout
				}
			}
			add = {
				value = 50
				desc = "DEVOUT_OR_LANDOWNERS"
			}
		}

		# more likely if the IG is unhappy with the monarchy, and that monarchy is not Carlist
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
					NOT = { ruler ?= { character_has_carlist_ideology = yes } }
				}
				ig_approval < 0
			}
			add = {
				value = 75
				desc = "UNHAPPY_WITH_NON_CARLIST_MONARCHY"
			}
		}

		# reduced unhappy modifier if it's not a monarchy
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					NOT = { RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes }
					NOT = { ruler ?= { character_has_carlist_ideology = yes } }
				}
				ig_approval < 0
			}
			add = {
				value = 25
				desc = "APPROVAL_BELOW_ZERO"
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_variable = communist_ig_var
					has_variable = chose_vanguardism
					has_variable = chose_anarchism
					has_variable = chose_communism
					has_variable = chose_ethno_nationalism
					has_variable = chose_conservatism
					has_variable = chose_fascism
				}
			}
			multiply = {
				value = 0.1
				desc = "CHOSE_A_DIFFERENT_PATH"
			}
		}
	}

	non_interest_group_leader_weight = {
		value = 200
		# less likely in a theocracy
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
				}
			}
			add = -75
		}
		# less likely if IG is happy in a republic
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					NOT = { country_has_monarchy_law = yes }
				}
				interest_group.ig_approval > 0
			}
			add = -100
		}

		# more likely for LO and Devout
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					is_interest_group_type = ig_landowners
					is_interest_group_type = ig_devout
				}
			}
			add = 50
		}

		# more likely if the IG is unhappy with the monarchy, and that monarchy is not Carlist
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
					NOT = { ruler ?= { character_has_carlist_ideology = yes } }
				}
				interest_group.ig_approval < 0
			}
			add = 75
		}

		# reduced unhappy modifier if it's not a monarchy
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					NOT = { RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes }
					NOT = { ruler ?= { character_has_carlist_ideology = yes } }
				}
				interest_group.ig_approval < 0
			}
			add = 25
		}

		# conservative and/or reactionary leaders have a higher spawn chance if you win the Two Spains as the conservatives.
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_variable = spa_two_spains_conservative_victory
			}
			add = 50
		}

		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_variable = communist_ig_var
					has_variable = chose_vanguardism
					has_variable = chose_anarchism
					has_variable = chose_communism
					has_variable = chose_ethno_nationalism
					has_variable = chose_conservatism
					has_variable = chose_fascism
				}
			}
			multiply = 0.1
		}
	}
}

REPLACE:ideology_carlist_2 = { # Average Progressiveness - -35
	icon = "gfx/interface/icons/ideology_icons/ideology_leader/ideology_leader_carlist.dds"

	character_ideology = yes

	lawgroup_governance_principles = {
		law_monarchy = strongly_approve
		law_presidential_republic = disapprove
		law_parliamentary_republic = disapprove
		law_corporate_state = neutral
		law_theocracy = approve
		law_council_republic = strongly_disapprove
	}

	lawgroup_economic_system = {
		law_traditionalism = neutral
		law_agrarianism = strongly_approve
		law_interventionism = approve
		law_industry_banned = disapprove
		law_laissez_faire = disapprove
		law_cooperative_ownership = strongly_disapprove
		law_command_economy = strongly_disapprove
		law_extraction_economy = disapprove
	}

	lawgroup_distribution_of_power = {
		law_oligarchy = approve
		law_autocracy = strongly_approve # Were opposed to absolutism, but the game defines Oligarchy as a bourgeois system
		law_single_party_state = neutral
		law_landed_voting = neutral
		law_wealth_voting = disapprove
		law_census_voting = disapprove
		law_universal_suffrage = strongly_disapprove
		law_anarchy = strongly_disapprove
		law_technocracy = strongly_disapprove
	}

	lawgroup_citizenship = {
		law_ethnostate = neutral
		law_subjecthood = approve
		law_national_supremacy = neutral
		law_racial_segregation = neutral
		law_cultural_exclusion = neutral
		law_multicultural = disapprove
	}

	lawgroup_church_and_state = {
		law_state_religion = strongly_approve
		law_freedom_of_conscience = disapprove
		law_total_separation = strongly_disapprove
		law_state_atheism = strongly_disapprove
	}

	country_trigger = {
		OR = {
			country_has_primary_culture = cu:spanish # I am in Spain...
			country_has_primary_culture = cu:catalan # ...without the S
			country_has_primary_culture = cu:basque # ...without the A
		}
		has_technology_researched = corporatism
		NOR = {
			any_interest_group = {
				has_ideology = ideology:ideology_republican_paternalistic
			}
			has_variable = monarchy_stamped_out_var
		}
	}

	interest_group_leader_trigger = {
		ideology_carlist_valid_trigger = yes
	}

	non_interest_group_leader_trigger = {
		# Agitators should have an ideology at odds with current laws
		NAND = {
			has_role_of_type = agitator
			owner = {
				RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
				has_law = law_type:law_agrarianism
				has_law = law_type:law_autocracy
				has_law = law_type:law_subjecthood
				has_law = law_type:law_state_religion
			}
		}
		interest_group ?= {
			ideology_carlist_valid_trigger = yes
		}
	}

	interest_group_leader_weight = {
		add = {
			value = 200
			desc = "base_value"
		}
		# less likely in a theocracy
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
				}
			}
			add = {
				value = -75
				desc = "THEOCRACY_LAW"
			}
		}
		# less likely if IG is happy in a republic
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					NOT = { country_has_monarchy_law = yes }
				}
				ig_approval > 0
			}
			add = {
				value = -100
				desc = "HAPPY_IN_REPUBLIC"
			}
		}

		# more likely for LO and Devout
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					is_interest_group_type = ig_landowners
					is_interest_group_type = ig_devout
				}
			}
			add = {
				value = 50
				desc = "DEVOUT_OR_LANDOWNERS"
			}
		}

		# more likely if the IG is unhappy with the monarchy, and that monarchy is not Carlist
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
					NOT = { ruler ?= { character_has_carlist_ideology = yes } }
				}
				ig_approval < 0
			}
			add = {
				value = 75
				desc = "UNHAPPY_WITH_NON_CARLIST_MONARCHY"
			}
		}

		# reduced unhappy modifier if it's not a monarchy
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					NOT = { RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes }
					NOT = { ruler ?= { character_has_carlist_ideology = yes } }
				}
				ig_approval < 0
			}
			add = {
				value = 25
				desc = "APPROVAL_BELOW_ZERO"
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_variable = communist_ig_var
					has_variable = chose_vanguardism
					has_variable = chose_anarchism
					has_variable = chose_communism
					has_variable = chose_ethno_nationalism
					has_variable = chose_conservatism
					has_variable = chose_fascism
				}
			}
			multiply = {
				value = 0.1
				desc = "CHOSE_A_DIFFERENT_PATH"
			}
		}
	}

	non_interest_group_leader_weight = {
		value = 200
		# less likely in a theocracy
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
				}
			}
			add = -75
		}
		# less likely if IG is happy in a republic
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					NOT = { RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes }
				}
				interest_group.ig_approval > 0
			}
			add = -100
		}

		# more likely for LO and Devout
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					is_interest_group_type = ig_landowners
					is_interest_group_type = ig_devout
				}
			}
			add = 50
		}

		# more likely if the IG is unhappy with the monarchy, and that monarchy is not Carlist
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
					NOT = { ruler ?= { character_has_carlist_ideology = yes } }
				}
				interest_group.ig_approval < 0
			}
			add = 75
		}

		# reduced unhappy modifier if it's not a monarchy
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					NOT = { RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes }
					NOT = { ruler ?= { character_has_carlist_ideology = yes } }
				}
				interest_group.ig_approval < 0
			}
			add = 25
		}

		# conservative and/or reactionary leaders have a higher spawn chance if you win the Two Spains as the conservatives.
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_variable = spa_two_spains_conservative_victory
			}
			add = 50
		}

		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_variable = communist_ig_var
					has_variable = chose_vanguardism
					has_variable = chose_anarchism
					has_variable = chose_communism
					has_variable = chose_ethno_nationalism
					has_variable = chose_conservatism
					has_variable = chose_fascism
				}
			}
			multiply = 0.1
		}
	}
}

REPLACE:ideology_miguelist = { # Average Progressiveness - -45
	icon = "gfx/interface/icons/ideology_icons/ideology_leader/ideology_leader_miguelist.dds"

	character_ideology = yes

	lawgroup_governance_principles = {
		law_monarchy = strongly_approve
		law_presidential_republic = disapprove
		law_parliamentary_republic = disapprove
		law_corporate_state = neutral
		law_social_monarchy = approve
		law_theocracy = disapprove
		law_council_republic = strongly_disapprove
	}

	lawgroup_economic_system = {
		law_traditionalism = strongly_approve
		law_agrarianism = approve
		law_interventionism = disapprove
		law_industry_banned = disapprove
		law_laissez_faire = disapprove
		law_cooperative_ownership = strongly_disapprove
		law_command_economy = strongly_disapprove
		law_extraction_economy = disapprove
	}

	lawgroup_distribution_of_power = {
		law_oligarchy = approve
		law_autocracy = strongly_approve # Were opposed to absolutism, but the game defines Oligarchy as a bourgeois system
		law_single_party_state = strongly_disapprove
		law_landed_voting = disapprove
		law_wealth_voting = strongly_disapprove
		law_census_voting = strongly_disapprove
		law_universal_suffrage = strongly_disapprove
		law_anarchy = strongly_disapprove
		law_technocracy = strongly_disapprove
	}

	lawgroup_citizenship = {
		law_ethnostate = neutral
		law_subjecthood = approve
		law_national_supremacy = neutral
		law_racial_segregation = neutral
		law_cultural_exclusion = neutral
		law_multicultural = disapprove
	}

	lawgroup_church_and_state = {
		law_state_religion = strongly_approve
		law_freedom_of_conscience = disapprove
		law_total_separation = strongly_disapprove
		law_state_atheism = strongly_disapprove
	}

	country_trigger = {
		country_has_primary_culture = cu:portuguese
		NOT = {
			has_technology_researched = corporatism
		}
		NOR = {
			any_interest_group = {
				has_ideology = ideology:ideology_republican_paternalistic
			}
			has_variable = monarchy_stamped_out_var
		}
	}

	interest_group_leader_trigger = {
		ideology_miguelist_valid_trigger = yes
	}

	non_interest_group_leader_trigger = {
		# Agitators should have an ideology at odds with current laws
		NAND = {
			has_role_of_type = agitator
			owner = {
				RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
				has_law = law_type:law_traditionalism
				has_law = law_type:law_oligarchy
				has_law = law_type:law_subjecthood
				has_law = law_type:law_state_religion
			}
		}
		interest_group ?= {
			ideology_miguelist_valid_trigger = yes
		}
	}

	interest_group_leader_weight = {
		add = {
			value = 200
			desc = "base_value"
		}
		# less likely in a theocracy
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
				}
			}
			add = {
				value = -75
				desc = "THEOCRACY_LAW"
			}
		}
		# less likely if IG is happy in a republic
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					NOT = { country_has_monarchy_law = yes }
				}
				ig_approval > 0
			}
			add = {
				value = -100
				desc = "HAPPY_IN_REPUBLIC"
			}
		}

		# more likely for LO and Devout
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					is_interest_group_type = ig_landowners
					is_interest_group_type = ig_devout
				}
			}
			add = {
				value = 50
				desc = "DEVOUT_OR_LANDOWNERS"
			}
		}

		# more likely if the IG is unhappy with the monarchy, and that monarchy is not Miguelist
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
					NOT = { ruler ?= { character_has_miguelist_ideology = yes } }
				}
				ig_approval < 0
			}
			add = {
				value = 75
				desc = "UNHAPPY_WITH_NON_MIGUELIST_MONARCHY"
			}
		}

		# reduced unhappy modifier if it's not a monarchy
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					NOT = { RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes }
					NOT = { ruler ?= { character_has_miguelist_ideology = yes } }
				}
				ig_approval < 0
			}
			add = {
				value = 25
				desc = "APPROVAL_BELOW_ZERO"
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_variable = communist_ig_var
					has_variable = chose_vanguardism
					has_variable = chose_anarchism
					has_variable = chose_communism
					has_variable = chose_ethno_nationalism
					has_variable = chose_conservatism
					has_variable = chose_fascism
				}
			}
			multiply = {
				value = 0.1
				desc = "CHOSE_A_DIFFERENT_PATH"
			}
		}
	}

	non_interest_group_leader_weight = {
		value = 200
		# less likely in a theocracy
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
				}
			}
			add = -75
		}
		# less likely if IG is happy in a republic
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					NOT = { country_has_monarchy_law = yes }
				}
				interest_group.ig_approval > 0
			}
			add = -100
		}

		# more likely for LO and Devout
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					is_interest_group_type = ig_landowners
					is_interest_group_type = ig_devout
				}
			}
			add = 50
		}

		# more likely if the IG is unhappy with the monarchy, and that monarchy is not miguelist
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
					NOT = { ruler ?= { character_has_miguelist_ideology = yes } }
				}
				interest_group.ig_approval < 0
			}
			add = 75
		}

		# reduced unhappy modifier if it's not a monarchy
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					NOT = { RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes }
					NOT = { ruler ?= { character_has_miguelist_ideology = yes } }
				}
				interest_group.ig_approval < 0
			}
			add = 25
		}

		# conservative and/or reactionary leaders have a higher spawn chance if you win the Two Spains as the conservatives.
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_variable = spa_two_spains_conservative_victory
			}
			add = 50
		}

		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_variable = communist_ig_var
					has_variable = chose_vanguardism
					has_variable = chose_anarchism
					has_variable = chose_communism
					has_variable = chose_ethno_nationalism
					has_variable = chose_conservatism
					has_variable = chose_fascism
				}
			}
			multiply = 0.1
		}
	}
}

REPLACE:ideology_miguelist_2 = { # Average Progressiveness - -35
	icon = "gfx/interface/icons/ideology_icons/ideology_leader/ideology_leader_miguelist.dds"

	character_ideology = yes

	lawgroup_governance_principles = {
		law_monarchy = strongly_approve
		law_presidential_republic = disapprove
		law_parliamentary_republic = disapprove
		law_corporate_state = neutral
		law_theocracy = disapprove
		law_council_republic = strongly_disapprove
	}

	lawgroup_economic_system = {
		law_traditionalism = neutral
		law_agrarianism = strongly_approve
		law_interventionism = approve
		law_industry_banned = disapprove
		law_laissez_faire = disapprove
		law_cooperative_ownership = strongly_disapprove
		law_command_economy = strongly_disapprove
		law_extraction_economy = disapprove
	}

	lawgroup_distribution_of_power = {
		law_oligarchy = approve
		law_autocracy = strongly_approve # Were opposed to absolutism, but the game defines Oligarchy as a bourgeois system
		law_single_party_state = neutral
		law_landed_voting = neutral
		law_wealth_voting = disapprove
		law_census_voting = disapprove
		law_universal_suffrage = strongly_disapprove
		law_anarchy = strongly_disapprove
		law_technocracy = strongly_disapprove
	}

	lawgroup_citizenship = {
		law_ethnostate = neutral
		law_subjecthood = approve
		law_national_supremacy = neutral
		law_racial_segregation = neutral
		law_cultural_exclusion = neutral
		law_multicultural = disapprove
	}

	lawgroup_church_and_state = {
		law_state_religion = strongly_approve
		law_freedom_of_conscience = disapprove
		law_total_separation = strongly_disapprove
		law_state_atheism = strongly_disapprove
	}

	country_trigger = {
		country_has_primary_culture = cu:portuguese
		has_technology_researched = corporatism
		NOR = {
			any_interest_group = {
				has_ideology = ideology:ideology_republican_paternalistic
			}
			has_variable = monarchy_stamped_out_var
		}
	}

	interest_group_leader_trigger = {
		ideology_miguelist_valid_trigger = yes
	}

	non_interest_group_leader_trigger = {
		# Agitators should have an ideology at odds with current laws
		NAND = {
			has_role_of_type = agitator
			owner = {
				RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
				has_law = law_type:law_traditionalism
				has_law = law_type:law_oligarchy
				has_law = law_type:law_subjecthood
				has_law = law_type:law_state_religion
			}
		}
		interest_group ?= {
			ideology_miguelist_valid_trigger = yes
		}
	}

	interest_group_leader_weight = {
		add = {
			value = 200
			desc = "base_value"
		}
		# less likely in a theocracy
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
				}
			}
			add = {
				value = -75
				desc = "THEOCRACY_LAW"
			}
		}
		# less likely if IG is happy in a republic
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					NOT = { country_has_monarchy_law = yes }
				}
				ig_approval > 0
			}
			add = {
				value = -100
				desc = "HAPPY_IN_REPUBLIC"
			}
		}

		# more likely for LO and Devout
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					is_interest_group_type = ig_landowners
					is_interest_group_type = ig_devout
				}
			}
			add = {
				value = 50
				desc = "DEVOUT_OR_LANDOWNERS"
			}
		}

		# more likely if the IG is unhappy with the monarchy, and that monarchy is not Miguelist
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
					NOT = { ruler ?= { character_has_miguelist_ideology = yes } }
				}
				ig_approval < 0
			}
			add = {
				value = 75
				desc = "UNHAPPY_WITH_NON_MIGUELIST_MONARCHY"
			}
		}

		# reduced unhappy modifier if it's not a monarchy
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					NOT = { RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes }
					NOT = { ruler ?= { character_has_miguelist_ideology = yes } }
				}
				ig_approval < 0
			}
			add = {
				value = 25
				desc = "APPROVAL_BELOW_ZERO"
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_variable = communist_ig_var
					has_variable = chose_vanguardism
					has_variable = chose_anarchism
					has_variable = chose_communism
					has_variable = chose_ethno_nationalism
					has_variable = chose_conservatism
					has_variable = chose_fascism
				}
			}
			multiply = {
				value = 0.1
				desc = "CHOSE_A_DIFFERENT_PATH"
			}
		}
	}

	non_interest_group_leader_weight = {
		value = 200
		# less likely in a theocracy
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
				}
			}
			add = -75
		}
		# less likely if IG is happy in a republic
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					NOT = { RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes }
				}
				interest_group.ig_approval > 0
			}
			add = -100
		}

		# more likely for LO and Devout
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					is_interest_group_type = ig_landowners
					is_interest_group_type = ig_devout
				}
			}
			add = 50
		}

		# more likely if the IG is unhappy with the monarchy, and that monarchy is not miguelist
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
					NOT = { ruler ?= { character_has_miguelist_ideology = yes } }
				}
				interest_group.ig_approval < 0
			}
			add = 75
		}

		# reduced unhappy modifier if it's not a monarchy
		if = {
			limit = {
				owner = {
					NOT = { RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes }
					NOT = { ruler ?= { character_has_miguelist_ideology = yes } }
				}
				interest_group.ig_approval < 0
			}
			add = 25
		}

		# conservative and/or reactionary leaders have a higher spawn chance if you win the Two Spains as the conservatives.
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_variable = spa_two_spains_conservative_victory
			}
			add = 50
		}

		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_variable = communist_ig_var
					has_variable = chose_vanguardism
					has_variable = chose_anarchism
					has_variable = chose_communism
					has_variable = chose_ethno_nationalism
					has_variable = chose_conservatism
					has_variable = chose_fascism
				}
			}
			multiply = 0.1
		}
	}
}
